entries.sentence: You need a password to get access to the website.
entries.chinese: access = 访问权限；你需要密码才能访问这个网站。

entries.sentence: I saw an ad for a new bike.
entries.chinese: ad = 广告；我看到了一则新自行车的广告。

entries.sentence: Living near school is a big advantage.
entries.chinese: advantage = 优势；住在学校附近是一个很大的优势。

entries.sentence: Our camping trip was a real adventure.
entries.chinese: adventure = 冒险；我们的露营旅行真是一次冒险。

entries.sentence: My aim is to pass the exam.
entries.chinese: aim = 目标；我的目标是通过考试。

entries.sentence: Her brother joined the air force last year.
entries.chinese: air force = 空军；她哥哥去年加入了空军。

entries.sentence: This airline flies to Madrid every day.
entries.chinese: airline = 航空公司；这家航空公司每天都有航班飞往马德里。

entries.sentence: The alarm woke us up at six.
entries.chinese: alarm = 闹钟；闹钟在六点把我们叫醒了。

entries.sentence: I put my alarm clock beside my bed.
entries.chinese: alarm clock = 闹钟；我把闹钟放在床边。

entries.sentence: She showed me her holiday photo album.
entries.chinese: album = 相册；她给我看了她的假日相册。

entries.sentence: Children learn the alphabet at school.
entries.chinese: alphabet = 字母表；孩子们在学校学习字母表。

entries.sentence: He hurt his ankle during the match.
entries.chinese: ankle = 脚踝；他在比赛中伤了脚踝。

entries.sentence: They celebrated their wedding anniversary.
entries.chinese: anniversary = 周年纪念日；他们庆祝了结婚周年纪念日。

entries.sentence: Please leave a message on the answerphone.
entries.chinese: answerphone = 电话答录机；请在电话答录机上留言。

entries.sentence: She wrote an apology after missing the meeting.
entries.chinese: apology = 道歉；她错过会议后写了一封道歉信。

entries.sentence: I ate an apple after lunch.
entries.chinese: apple = 苹果；午饭后我吃了一个苹果。

entries.sentence: The architect designed our new library.
entries.chinese: architect = 建筑师；这位建筑师设计了我们的新图书馆。

entries.sentence: I love the architecture of old towns.
entries.chinese: architecture = 建筑；我喜欢古老城镇的建筑。

entries.sentence: Arithmetic was my favourite maths topic.
entries.chinese: arithmetic = 算术；算术曾是我最喜欢的数学内容。

entries.sentence: Grandpa reads in his armchair every evening.
entries.chinese: armchair = 扶手椅；爷爷每天晚上坐在扶手椅里读书。

entries.sentence: The army helped after the flood.
entries.chinese: army = 军队；洪水过后军队提供了帮助。

entries.sentence: We waited for the arrival of the train.
entries.chinese: arrival = 到达；我们等待火车到达。

entries.sentence: The nurse gave me an aspirin for my headache.
entries.chinese: aspirin = 阿司匹林；护士给了我一片阿司匹林治头痛。

entries.sentence: The astronaut spoke to students from space.
entries.chinese: astronaut = 宇航员；宇航员从太空和学生们讲话。

entries.sentence: Write the at sign between your name and the website.
entries.chinese: at sign = @符号；在你的名字和网站之间写上@符号。

entries.sentence: The cafe has a friendly atmosphere.
entries.chinese: atmosphere = 气氛；这家咖啡馆气氛友好。

entries.sentence: The team started a strong attack.
entries.chinese: attack = 进攻；球队发动了一次强有力的进攻。

entries.sentence: A positive attitude helps you learn.
entries.chinese: attitude = 态度；积极的态度有助于学习。

entries.sentence: The author signed my book.
entries.chinese: author = 作者；作者在我的书上签了名。

entries.sentence: The leaves turn yellow in autumn.
entries.chinese: autumn = 秋天；秋天树叶会变黄。

entries.sentence: The babysitter looked after the twins.
entries.chinese: babysitter = 临时保姆；临时保姆照看那对双胞胎。

entries.sentence: Put your lunch in your backpack.
entries.chinese: backpack = 背包；把午餐放进你的背包里。

entries.sentence: The backpacker stayed in a cheap hostel.
entries.chinese: backpacker = 背包客；那位背包客住在一家便宜的旅舍。

entries.sentence: Backpacking across Europe was exciting.
entries.chinese: backpacking = 背包旅行；在欧洲背包旅行很令人兴奋。

entries.sentence: We play badminton after school.
entries.chinese: badminton = 羽毛球；我们放学后打羽毛球。

entries.sentence: She packed a bag for the weekend.
entries.chinese: bag = 包；她为周末收拾了一个包。

entries.sentence: Our baggage arrived late at the airport.
entries.chinese: baggage = 行李；我们的行李在机场晚到了。

entries.sentence: The baker sells fresh bread every morning.
entries.chinese: baker = 面包师；面包师每天早晨卖新鲜面包。

entries.sentence: We had breakfast on the balcony.
entries.chinese: balcony = 阳台；我们在阳台上吃了早饭。

entries.sentence: The ball rolled under the car.
entries.chinese: ball = 球；球滚到了汽车下面。

entries.sentence: She goes to ballet class on Fridays.
entries.chinese: ballet = 芭蕾舞；她星期五去上芭蕾舞课。

entries.sentence: The red balloon flew into the sky.
entries.chinese: balloon = 气球；红色气球飞上了天空。

entries.sentence: He put a banana in his lunch box.
entries.chinese: banana = 香蕉；他把一根香蕉放进午餐盒。

entries.sentence: The school band played at the concert.
entries.chinese: band = 乐队；学校乐队在音乐会上演奏。

entries.sentence: The nurse put a bandage on my knee.
entries.chinese: bandage = 绷带；护士在我的膝盖上缠了绷带。

entries.sentence: The banker explained the loan carefully.
entries.chinese: banker = 银行家；银行家仔细解释了贷款。

entries.sentence: Online banking makes it easy to pay bills.
entries.chinese: banking = 银行业务；网上银行业务让付账更容易。

entries.sentence: We met at a small bar near the station.
entries.chinese: bar = 酒吧；我们在车站附近的一家小酒吧见面。

entries.sentence: We had a barbecue in the garden.
entries.chinese: barbecue = 烧烤；我们在花园里吃了烧烤。

entries.sentence: The barber cut my hair before the party.
entries.chinese: barber = 理发师；聚会前理发师给我剪了头发。
